decks.notes: The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing control cards to disrupt your opponent's strategy while generating card advantage through card draw and manipulation. Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock offer early game defense, while Burst Lightning provides removal for threats. Opt and Sleight of Hand help dig for key cards, while Spell Snare and Spell Pierce counter opposing spells. Abandon Attachments and Sear provide additional removal, while Stock Up and Winternight Stories offer card advantage. Finally, the deck includes some finishers like Hearth Elemental and Glacial Dragonhunt to close out the game.

This deck focuses on overwhelming the opponent with fast and aggressive creatures, utilizing efficient mana dorks like Llanowar Elves to ramp up and swarm the board with powerful threats. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional power boosts, while Sapling Nursery helps with creating a wide board presence. Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage provide mana fixing and card advantage, allowing for smooth gameplay. Overall, the deck aims to maintain early game pressure and close out the game before the opponent can stabilize.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to take control of the game by using various spells to disrupt the opponent's strategy while also gaining card advantage through cantrips such as Opt and Sleight of Hand. The deck focuses on tempo plays with cards like Burst Lightning and Spell Snare, and has removal options like Abrade and Sear to deal with threats on the board. The deck also includes cards like Eddymurk Crab and Sunderflock to potentially win the game through alternate win conditions.

The key idea of this deck is to build a fast and aggressive board presence by playing low-cost creatures and using cards that pump up their power and toughness. The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with creatures like Badgermole Cub, Sazh's Chocobo, and Mossborn Hydra, while also utilizing ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Earthbender Ascension to quickly flood the battlefield. By consistently playing threats and buffing them with Mightform Harmonizer and Archdruid's Charm, the deck aims to deliver a lethal blow before the opponent can stabilize.

This deck focuses on using aggressive creatures with disruptive abilities to quickly advance its game plan, while also maintaining card advantage and resilience through card draw and removal spells. The key strategy is to pressure the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures and disruptive spells, while also maintaining control of the board with removal options. By efficiently managing resources and making strategic plays, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and secure victory through a combination of aggression and control elements.

The main concept of this deck is to control the board using a combination of spells and abilities from Izzet Control cards. By utilizing cards like Gran-Gran, Abandon Attachments, and Firebending Lesson, players can manipulate the game to their advantage. Monument to Endurance and Accumulate Wisdom provide card advantage and resource management. Boomerang Basics and Combustion Technique allow for removal of threats, while Artist's Talent and Stormchaser's Talent offer additional options for control. With a mix of creatures, spells, and lands, this deck aims to outwit opponents and dominate the battlefield.

This deck focuses on quickly playing creatures with strong abilities and using them to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of power and control. By utilizing mana acceleration from Llanowar Elves and Quantum Riddler, as well as card draw and utility from Gene Pollinator and Keen-Eyed Curator, the goal is to build a board presence that can quickly end the game. The deck also includes cards like Archdruid's Charm and Craterhoof Behemoth to provide extra finishers and powerful effects to push for victory. The mana base is designed to consistently provide the necessary colors for all cards in the deck.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a mix of creature removal, counter spells, and card draw. The deck focuses on maintaining board presence with creatures like Mightform Harmonizer and Icetill Explorer while disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Burst Lightning and Spell Snare. By using cards like Consult the Star Charts and Stock Up, the deck aims to generate card advantage and outvalue the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes various land cards to ensure mana consistency and flexibility in casting spells.

The focus of this Dimir Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and disruption spells. By utilizing cards like Flitterwing Nuisance and Floodpits Drowner to apply early pressure, and Spyglass Siren and Tishana's Tidebinder to control the board, the deck aims to maintain tempo and keep the opponent on the back foot. Enduring Curiosity and Cecil, Dark Knight provide card advantage, while spells like Bitter Triumph and Requiting Hex deal with threats efficiently. With a mix of aggression and control, this deck aims to close out games quickly and decisively.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing powerful control spells, disrupting your opponent's strategy, and ultimately overwhelming them with a combination of powerful creatures and removal spells. By efficiently managing resources, countering threats, and carefully choosing when to deploy your creatures, you can outmaneuver your opponent and secure victory through a methodical and calculated approach to the game. Additionally, the inclusion of key lands such as Gloomlake Verge and Unholy Annex/Ritual Chamber allows for additional flexibility and resource generation to further solidify your control over the battlefield.

This deck focuses on fast and aggressive gameplay, using cheap creatures like Llanowar Elves and Sazh's Chocobo to quickly build a board presence. Cards like Mightform Harmonizer and Tifa Lockhart provide a strong payoff for playing multiple creatures early on. The deck also includes some utility cards like Snakeskin Veil for protection and Earthbender Ascension for additional damage. The mana base is designed to ensure consistent access to the required colors of mana. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, efficient creatures and spells.

The main focus of this deck is to control the pace of the game using a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. By utilizing cards like Gran-Gran and Monument to Endurance to generate value and Abandon Attachments to disrupt the opponent's strategy, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and establish dominance. Cards like Firebending Lesson and Combustion Technique provide additional removal options, while spells like Accumulate Wisdom and It'll Quench Ya! help to ensure a steady stream of resources. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through careful resource management and strategic play.

The deck focuses on slowing down opponents while building up resources through spells and abilities. It utilizes a combination of removal, card draw, and counter spells to control the battlefield. The goal is to outlast the opponent by managing threats efficiently and ultimately overwhelm them with powerful spells and creatures. The deck's synergy lies in its ability to disrupt the opponent's game plan while setting up its own win conditions. By carefully managing resources and staying ahead of the opponent, the deck aims to secure victory through superior control and strategic play.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to flood the board with low-cost creatures, supplemented by strong enchantments and protection spells. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing cards like Frenzied Baloth, Kinscaer Sentry, and Lightstall Inquisitor to quickly apply pressure. Royal Treatment and Sheltered by Ghosts provide additional buffs and protection to keep your creatures alive, while cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Scout for Survivors offer additional utility and card advantage. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence early on and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The deck focuses on quickly getting creatures on the board to apply early pressure and overwhelm the opponent. It combines efficient mana ramp with powerful creatures like Badgermole Cub and Quantum Riddler to establish a strong board presence. The inclusion of cards like Spider-Sense and Ouroboroid also adds protection and resilience to the deck. The use of Nature's Rhythm helps to further accelerate mana production and ensure a smooth curve. Overall, the deck aims to be aggressive and fast-paced, while still maintaining some flexibility and control elements.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a mix of counter spells, removal, and card advantage. It utilizes creatures with powerful abilities to help maintain board presence and apply pressure. The deck also includes spells to draw additional cards, ramp up mana, and disrupt opponent's strategies. With a combination of removal, counter spells, and card advantage, the deck aims to outlast opponents and establish board control to ultimately win the game.
